sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 팔란티어, 1분기 매출 85% 급증 및 연간 매출 가이던스 상향 조정

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출이 전년 동기 대비 85% 성장한 16억 3,300만 달러를 기록하며 역대 최고 성장률을 달성했습니다.
미국 시장의 강력한 모멘텀을 바탕으로 2026년 연간 매출 가이던스를 71% 성장 수준으로 상향 조정했습니다.
Rule of 40 점수가 145%를 기록하며 AI 인프라 기업으로서의 높은 효율성을 입증했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 미국 사업 부문이 전년 대비 104% 성장하며 전체 실적을 견인했으며, 특히 미국 상업용 매출은 133% 급증했습니다.
100만 달러 이상의 계약 206건을 포함하여 총 계약 가치 24억 1,000만 달러 규모의 신규 계약을 체결했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 기준 순이익은 8억 7,100만 달러로 53%의 마진율을 기록했습니다.
조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.33달러, GAAP 기준 EPS는 0.34달러를 기록했습니다.
현금 및 현금성 자산, 단기 국채 보유액은 80억 달러 수준입니다.

watchItems.text: 미국 상업용 부문의 120% 이상 성장 가이던스 달성 여부와 가속화되는 미국 시장 수요의 지속 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2026q1ex991pressrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Palantir Reports Q1 2026 U.S. Revenue Growth of 104% Y/Y and Revenue Growth of 85% Y/Y; Raises FY 2026 Revenue Guidance to 71% Y/Y Growth and U.S. Comm Revenue Guidance to 120% Y/Y, Crushing Consensus Expectations 5/4/2026 MIAMI — (BUSINESS WIRE) — Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) today announced financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. “Palantir's Rule of 40 score has soared to 145%. We have shattered the metric, a feat matched only by other fellow AI infrastructure companies: NVIDIA, Micron and SK hynix. Momentum surged as we grew 85% last quarter—our highest-ever year-over-year growth rate—by more than doubling our U.S. business, and now we are raising our full-year revenue guidance to 71% growth, 10 points ahead of our guidance from last quarter, driven by our confidence in an accelerati

ng U.S. market,” said Alex Karp, Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Palantir Technologies. Q1 2026 Highlights • U.S. revenue grew 104% year-over-year and 19% quarter-over-quarter to $1.282 billion ◦ U.S. commercial revenue grew 133% year-over-year and 18% quarter-over-quarter to $595 million ◦ U.S. government revenue grew 84% year-over-year and 21% quarter-over-quarter to $687 million • Revenue grew 85% year-over-year and 16% quarter-over-quarter to $1.633 billion • Closed 206 deals of at least $1 million, 72 deals of at least $5 million, and 47 deals of at least $10 million • Closed total contract value (“TCV”) of $2.41 bil  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.282 billion = 12억 8,200만 달러; $595 million = 5억 9,500만 달러; $687 million = 6억 8,700만 달러; $1.633 billion = 16억 3,300만 달러; $1 million = 100만 달러; $5 million = 500만 달러; $10 million = 1,000만 달러; $2.41 billion = 24억 1,000만 달러; $1.176 billion = 11억 7,600만 달러; $4.92 billion = 49억 2,000만 달러; $754 million = 7억 5,400만 달러; $1.282 = 1.282달러.

representing a 46% margin • Adjusted income from operations of $984 million, representing a 60% margin • Rule of 40 score of 145% • GAAP net income of $871 million, representing a 53% margin • Cash from operations of $899 million, representing a 55% margin • Adjusted free cash flow of $925 million, representing a 57% margin • GAAP earnings per share (“EPS”) of $0.34 • Adjusted EPS of $0.33 • Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term U.S. Treasury securities of $8.0 billion Q1 2026 Financial Summary (Unaudited) (Amounts in thousands, except percentages and per share amounts) First Quarter Amount Revenue $ 1,632,583 Year-over-year growth 85 % Amount Margin Income from Operations $ 753,998 46 % Adjusted Income from Operations   Normalized numeric aliases: $984 million = 9억 8,400만 달러; $871 million = 8억 7,100만 달러; $899 million = 8억 9,900만 달러; $925 million = 9억 2,500만 달러; $8.0 billion = 80억 달러; $984 = 984달러; $871 = 871달러; $899 = 899달러; $925 = 925달러; $0.34 = 0.34달러; $0.33 = 0.33달러; $8.0 = 8.0달러.

me Attributable to Common Stockholders $ 856,450 Adjusted EBITDA $ 990,310 61 % GAAP EPS, Diluted $ 0.34 Adjusted EPS, Diluted $ 0.33 Outlook For Q2 2026, we expect: • Revenue of between $1.797 – $1.801 billion. • Adjusted income from operations of between $1.063 – $1.067 billion. For full year 2026: • We are raising our revenue guidance to between $7.650 – $7.662 billion. • We are raising our U.S. commercial revenue guidance to in excess of $3.224 billion, representing a growth rate of at least 120%. • We are raising our adjusted income from operations guidance to between $4.440 – $4.452 billion. • We are raising our adjusted free cash flow guidance to between $4.2 – $4.4   Normalized numeric aliases: $1.801 billion = 18억 100만 달러; $1.067 billion = 10억 6,700만 달러; $7.662 billion = 76억 6,200만 달러; $3.224 billion = 32억 2,400만 달러; $4.452 billion = 44억 5,200만 달러; $4.4 billion = 44억 달러; $1.797 = 1.797달러; $1.801 = 1.801달러; $1.063 = 1.063달러; $1.067 = 1.067달러; $7.650 = 7.650달러; $7.662 = 7.662달러.
